notes: Full/targeted Pi sync of affected shared skills from source. dist/pi keeps compatible skills only and excludes runtime-owned do/done/escalate plus extension-wrapper auto/babysit-pr. Body adaptation applied: Claude session JSONL line omitted, plugin-qualified skill ids stripped to bare names, and universal goal-setting backstop guidance preserved in mechanism-neutral wording instead of dropping it because Pi does not name the mechanism /goal. README/package docs continue to describe install via pi install git:github.com/doodledood/manifest-dev@main, the Harness-level Do runtime, and manifest-dev-owned JSON subprocess verifier fanout. Repo-root package.json and pi/extensions remain source-owned.
